creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
the nvidia-driver 390-143 pkg is working until kernel v stable/13-ec47ee78b, later not

the nvidia-driver-390-144 port is not working with any version, 13 release or stable

the card is Gforce 710 and 730

there is no comprehensive error msg

relevant Xorg.log for the 390.144

[    42.640] (II) Loading sub module "ramdac"
[    42.640] (II) LoadModule: "ramdac"

[    42.643] (EE) NVIDIA:     system's kernel log for additional error messages and
[    42.643] (EE) NVIDIA:     consult the NVIDIA README for details.
